hotel_name: DoubleTree by Hilton Resort & Spa Marjan Island

reviews.title: Mother slept in towels for hours
reviews.text:
Very disappointing and unacceptable experience.

We repeatedly requested extra bedding, blanket, and bedsheet for the third guest from around 8:00 PM until after 1:30 AM.

Nothing was properly delivered for more than 5 hours.

As a result, my 60-year-old mother had to sleep wrapped in bath towels because no proper bedding was provided.

Calls from the room as existing guests were ignored, but when calling from a mobile phone pretending to make a new reservation, the hotel answered immediately.

The room service / do-not-disturb panel was also faulty and even the hotel staff could not fix it.

This level of service is completely unacceptable for a Hilton-branded property.

The staff is an absolute disaster, who has no skills, nor even a simple understanding of how to manage clients and handle issues. 
It all begun with a lady at the restaurant reception, selectively asking guests to change their attire. A few guests got insulted and asked for her manager, who upon arrival directly started shouting at the guests instead of trying to de-escalate the issue somehow. 
A terrible beginning of the day, which is never expected in a five star resort and as a result -  wasted staycation. 
It is a clear example of how a reputable chain is affected by uneducated, unprofessional staff and a management who apparently does not care. 
It has no short term effect, but will reveal itself on a long run. Waiting for the brand to leave the hotel soon. 

Apart from that, there are several issues with facilities, but they are very insignificant comparing to the rude staff.

It was a waste of time activities like water park is closed and the activities on the beach Don’t allow teenagers to use them like jet ski to use them there for adults are also quite expensive not normal prices for such a place you can get the same facilities at other hotels at Much-more affordable rates, building work can be heard through rooms. I was held up in reception and wasn’t able to sort out my check-in and accommodation for three hours and the following day also wasted the morning trying to deal with the Reception wasn’t good stay at all.
The hotel is not suitable for guests with older children Seemed more equipped for serving the elderly it looked more like a retirement home than a Hilton Hotel resort

reviews.title: Disappointing Stay at DoubleTree by Hilton Resort & Spa Marjan Island
reviews.text:
Sure, here's the updated review including your additional concern:

Our recent stay at the DoubleTree by Hilton Resort & Spa Marjan Island in Ras Al Khaimah was far from satisfactory. 
Here are the main issues we encountered:

1. Lengthy Check-in Process:
 The check-in process was extremely slow, taking far longer than expected and causing unnecessary frustration.
2. Poor Hotel Facilities:
The facilities at the hotel were subpar, not meeting the standard we anticipated from a DoubleTree by Hilton property.
3. Unhelpful Staff:
The staff seemed unwilling to assist, which added to our overall disappointment.
4. Terrible Breakfast Experience:
The breakfast was the worst we have ever had. The quality was poor, the variety was minimal, and it was certainly not worth the price we paid.
5. Unaccommodating to Requests:
Despite our specific request for connecting rooms, the hotel failed to accommodate this, further diminishing our experience.

Overall, this hotel is not recommended for families. Our experience was very disappointing, and we would not choose to stay here again.

reviews.text:
We had the worst experience ever during our stay at Double tree RAK MARJAN.
We had a lot of unprofessional, smelly, dirty, etc….
This is our worst stay ever in a hotel.
It started with a electrical smell inside the room, a none working kettle and none  responsible stuff. After repeating our calls to the staff they moved us into another room another floor. Once we went outside the elevator the smell in the corridor was really bad. We went into our room every the cleaned our room they don’t replace the towels, they took my shirts for dry cleaning and ironing, and they damaged my white shirt it has a yellow stains on it. Nevertheless, my wife found a greenish substance in our fridge which we didn’t know anything about it. We informed the team, they said they will feed us back. As expected with no feedback, as nothing happened or they don’t care. Every time we want to order something we need yo wait more than 30 minutes for the operator to take our call and 40 minutes to get what we want. The food was really bad and watery. The room still stink of an old smell. They withdrew money from my card without even checking with me and they refund it as well without even explaining what happened. We were afraid for them to clean and put something in our son’s milk or water. I couldn’t leave cause I had a conference meetings at work there.
Despite the rudeness of the people that they greet you when you arrive.
It was the worst ever experience we have ever had as family. I really don’t and will ever stay at any Hilton hotels.

reviews.title: Below expectations for Hilton Branded Hotel
reviews.text:
Unfortunately, our stay at DoubleTree by Hilton Marjan Island was disappointing. The room had thick dust, the water mixer was faulty, and despite paying for an upgrade, we were initially given a room without a proper balcony.

These are basic standards that were not met and required unnecessary follow-ups at check-in. For the price and the Hilton brand, we expected far better attention to cleanliness and room allocation.
reviews.response:
Dear Lusantha,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your recent stay with us.

I am truly sorry to learn that your experience did not meet your expectations. Please accept my sincere apologies for the cleanliness issues you encountered in the room, as well as the faulty water mixer. 

I am also sorry for the inconvenience caused by the initial room allocation and the need for follow up at check in to receive a room with a different layout on the balcony. This understandably added frustration at the start of your stay and does not reflect the level of attention and efficiency we aim to provide.

Your comments have been shared with our Housekeeping, Engineering, and Front Office leadership teams for immediate review and corrective action. Feedback like yours is taken very seriously, particularly when it highlights a gap between brand promise and delivery.

Thank you again for your honesty. While I regret that your stay fell below expectations, we appreciate you

reviews.negatives:
Serious Management Failure and Poor Service Experience

I would like to formally share my disappointment regarding my recent stay, which unfortunately reflected a very poor level of service — completely unacceptable for the value paid.
	1.	The reception team failed to deliver even a basic warm welcome, creating a negative first impression right from check-in.
	2.	Pool towels were in bad condition and not folded, giving the impression they had been used — extremely poor hygiene standards.
	3.	The kids’ inflatable on the beach was deflated and unsafe, causing discomfort to my children.
	4.	Despite requesting early check-in between 1–2 PM (fully aware it’s subject to availability), we waited until 3:45 PM with no clear updates from the staff.
	5.	Spa facilities (sauna, jacuzzi, and steam) were closed for maintenance without any prior notice to guests.
	6.	The kids’ club was unhygienic and had a strong, unpleasant smell during the evening.
	7.	Room service response was extremely slow — every request took more than an hour and a second follow-up call (including fixing the A/C, changing towels, and drying the washroom).

8. Dinner buffet with limited varieties and slow filling the plates

Cons:  Long check in during busy hour.  Waiting too long for the buggy. Luckily we decided to walk to the room and not waiting for the buggy in the lobby. reviews.negatives:
When I booked my stay I received an e-mail from the Hotel saying ("All of our facilities are operational.") as well as ("All pools are open and operational.") which is not true as the "Pirate Boat Aqua Zone" was closed for maintenance few days before our scheduled stay (as informed later on after raising our complaint) but on the Hotel website is says that it is open daily from 9am till sunset.!! Which is not true.

At the time of my check-in I asked the staff to select a room near to the Pirate Aqua Zone to have a near access to it and still the staff did not mention anything about the closure of the Pirate aqua park. Also the only temperature controlled warm pool was closed and the other pools was so cold to swim in as well as the kids pool was very cold too, I raised a complain with the Hotel office about it and this was only 90 minutes after our arrival and the Hotel staff was very dis-understanding, not helpful and not very decently replying to me, so I requested a refund or rescheduling my stay to another day after the maintenance of the only warm pool and the aqua park is over considering that the Hotel have provided me a wrong information and misleading to me as a guest and still they refused both solutions. I did not book this stay to spend it in the room but I booked it to enjoy it with my kids in the water facilities. After all the stay was very bad and the staff communication was not really very good when they mentioned to me that they refuse the refund and you can place your complaint with booking.com . Me as a guest I make my plan of the stay according to what information you provide to us and this should be very well considered as I am not supposed to pay for a service which is written but not provided.

Most have been here only a couple of months. High turnover of staff it looks like. I don't blame them. The mosquitos got my 3 yr old so bad we fled on the last day despite having a late check out. Saw several kids with bites and at the mall close by at the pharmacy asking for After Bite!! What a waste of time!

Then I wanted to book the La Braserie (Italian restaurant) . What a mess for such a small task ! 
The reception line was always busy, then they tried to connect to the restaurant and their lines was constantly busy ! Finally after 1 hour at least, they ma naged to call the restaurant and then the restaurant informed me to just walk in. And told them that the hotel was full, so what happens if I walk in and there are no tables. So I had to convince them to book a table for me. 

Hotel being fully booked, there was hardly any space in the 5-6 pools at the hotel. 

Not very pleasant having to swim in a crowded pool !! 

Food was quite exquisite though !

The Lousy Customer Service we have ever received and sad to say that we were expecting for an excellent one since we spent a lot for this vacation. 
They checked us in 40 minutes late and did not give any apology. 
We took the all inclusive package but the food options are ordinary and nothing special. Some even did not taste good and the  beef was like gum.
It was too crowded and they did not even follow their own dress code policy at dinner. We were stressed to prepare smart casual attire only to find out 80% of the crowd were just on shorts and shirt.
 Housekeeping did not provide us with dental hygiene kit. And towels given was not being folded.
We requested for a baby cot twice and it never arrived.

Our daughter cried because she did not get to have the face paint and lollies due to our delay our itinerary and our moods was totally ruined. Receptionist was rude and  no one even apologized for all the bad experiences we had verbalized. 
 
The one and only  crew who made us feel welcome was Sami from the restaurant.

reviews.title: Old property and stoney beach
reviews.text: Extremely poor hotel and even worst rooms. Stained beds, old furniture and so on. To start with the bathroom didn’t have any moisturizer or shampoo dispensers filled, they were all empty and we had to tell them to fill those. We were with a 1 year infant and were told at the time of check in that we will be provided a cot in our room, but nobody cared to do that. The breakfast menu was so disappointing and had only American or Mediterranean options and just 1 -2 Indian options and taste was really bad. I would never ever want to visit this property again as they are just taking money with no service at all.

reviews.negatives: Service, room service does not pick up to calls every time we tried. Then we need to go down to front desk to get things done. Such a pathetic service for customers. Why to keep landlines if no need to answer.

reviews.title: Very well unorganized....
reviews.text:
They did everything to make you feel that we had make mistake by booking here. Checkin took more than 20 mins, yes I'd to upgrade my stay but still 20 mins??? They were running out of welcome 🍪 and there was no effort made to make it available, a simple "sorry cookies are finished". We (2 adults and 2 kids) reach our room, room was spacious but you could sense this was not a 5* hotel room. And my suspicion was true, bed headrest was dirty, very dirty. Had only two mugs both were different shapes and sizes (this tells they are not bothered about their brand image). Hairdryer can not be used in bathroom as dryer has 3 pins and bathroom has socket only for two. We had to use it in a very unconvenient place outside the bathroom. 

You have to ask everything I mean everything. Ask for tea coffee sachets and they will provide only 2 pieces, fine, but where is the stirrers? Since there is no cutlery in the room, how would you mix your drink?

Tried to use the fancy system to intimate housekeeping to make room, no response, twice. Had to call them in traditional way to get their attention. Room was cleaned, a new towel was placed in bathroom. 'A towel'. Upon calling Jhanvi said she is arranging. 15mins passed... called again..."sorry sir, we are sending". 5 mins later a gentleman appears with some toiletries(i had to ask for that as well) but no towels..."sorry sir towels are not available" seriously??

Hygiene seemed big issue in the restaurant area. Table mats were being reused, even upon asking they did not change the mats and just cleaned them, we removed them and placed our plates directly on the table. 

Good things - pools were good, access to beach, water park, kids club made our stay tolerable.

-No social distance whatsoever, the elevators were packed (even though it's suppose to be a maximum of 4peoples,no supervision from staff to ensure the rules).
-Almost none of the guest were wearing masks, be in the elevator or lobby.
-the staff were really nice but the management should definitely improve a lot.

We are not difficult customers, but cleanliness in a hotel is of the upmost importance. For the price of the rooms  it was a huge disappointment and will never go again.

reviews.positives: I was quite disappointed with several aspects of my stay at your hotel from the 19th to the 21st. I would like to express my concerns and hope for improvements in the future.
reviews.negatives:
Firstly, upon arrival, I was informed that check-in time was 3 PM. However, I was unable to check in until 4 PM due to my room needing to be cleaned. This caused an inconvenient delay in our plans.

Secondly, as it was my marriage anniversary, I requested a room on a higher floor with a pleasant view. Unfortunately, the room I was provided had a poor view, without any sight of the swimming pool or garden.

reviews.title: Great facilities , poor service and management
reviews.text:
While the hotel is really cool , nice spot and great facilities , however hotel is so understaffed and cannot handle the number of groups that it’a hosting. Few comments which really need attention 

1- we needed to beg for pool towels every single day as there is no enough. Staff was not willing even to help or find a solution, everyday they are saying “come after 30 minutes” 
2- some lifeguards on the phones all the time , they dont care what happens with you.
3- restaurants booking manager does not seem to be interested in the job some 
4- everything is manual and on paper for example lost and found. I had to go everyday 3 times to ask for a lost item and you need to repeat the story every time and they never found the item.
5- which was the worst one, our son got sick at midnight, we called to ask for a doctor . Clinic sent a whatasapp once and then they never responded to our calls and messages. After 45 mins they say , can you pay for the doctor to clme to your room. In the meantime i called reception and never picked up because they are busy with other calls (again understaffed) . Inhad to run to go get my car and then take my son to the nearest hospital as he was vomiting constantly. Did someone care or call afterwards, of course no.

Overall the stay was mot pleasant despite the great facilities of this place but i am definitely not coming back to this place.
reviews.response:

Pieter Van Beugen

reviews.text: This claims to be a 5* hotel but is probably 4* at most. The location is lovely but when we were there it felt like there were not enough staff to manage the demands.  There we no cups in the room, only 2 towels for 3 people, no minibar. Checking in took 40 minutes and was very slow. Restaurants were OK, the staff tried hard but the restaurants seemed rather dated and needed refurbishing. There was no beach service for drinks. reviews.title: Great hotel with service glitches that need to be fixed
reviews.text: This is a very nice hotel - however: I got locked out on the balcony twice - the first time I had my phone but it took 15 minutes to send someone to let me back in. I’d reserved a table in their Asian restaurant for my birthday - they knew this - but forgot to tell me that the restaurant was closed and it took 20 minutes to rectify. They did give me a free dinner and bottle of bubbly which was lovely and in the end I had a lovely evening. They also gave me a breakfast for the balcony incident and then tried to charge me for it. Despite these things I would still recommend this hotel - the location is stunning and my sea view room was exactly as described - the view was stunning.  As I say, I would definitely recommend this place - but you need to double check stuff and be careful not to know nk the balcony door latch. One final point - before going I asked if the pool was open - the beach view pool was until the Sunday when it remained closed - good job I like the sea!

But when it came to check in, there was some confusions in the confirmation on booking and it took some time for them to sort the issue.  Even after check in and while I was in my room, got frequent calls form the reception saying that I have made two bookings one through Agoda and other through Booking.com which I was not so sure about. Later on I was informed  that the booking through booking.com was placed by Agoda itself and even during payment also there were some confusions. 
Apart from this everything was ok.
Facilities was ok, slight things to be taken into account was - in the bathroom tissue box provided was empty. No floor mats. AC cooling was less.   
Food was ok, but I can’t rate to very good or excellent. 
Customer service to be improved as there were confusions and delays during check in and check out. 
Even I have told them to coordinate between themselves change of shift.

2-My booking in agoda shows that i hace free wifi. But they say no free wifi only in public area 
3-when i return back to my room i found there was too much ants in the room(on the bed, pillows, bathroom, sink ) i call reception to find solution they send me pest control staff to spray the ants and 10 mintues later the ants appeared again i slept and my family in the sofa bed ( i have picture for this if you want to see)

reviews.negatives:
The breakfast was disappointing with too many people, not much variety, and slow service because of the crowds.
Additionally, my credit card was mistakenly charged twice, once at check-in and again at check-out, for the same stay. The last charge was made without my permission. I have already raised this issue with the booking.com team and am considering taking it up with the relevant authorities.

reviews.title: Courteous staff but not up to date facilities.
reviews.text:
Check-in was quick and easy but it took us 2 to 3 reminder calls as we didn't get our luggage in the room. Finally I had to visit the front desk for the same. The same thing was repeated while checking out.
During the stay, We noticed that the drainage system in our bath tub was faulty and we had to wait for the plumbers to fix it. I would overall rate the hotel as 2.5 out of 5 stars.

reviews.title: The property is overrated and the staycation experience was below our expectations.
reviews.positives:
The location of the resort is nice and it’s a huge property with private beach. My kid enjoyed in there kids club which had exciting activities. The property has multiple swimming pools for kids, adults and family along with bouncy castle and splash pad for kids.
I liked their staff as they were all pleasant & welcoming to us.
reviews.negatives:
There were few disappointments coz of which I didn’t enjoy my all - inclusive stay in this Hilton property. Firstly when I reached hotel at 2:30 pm they made us wait for 2 hours before giving us room. They asked us to have lunch in their restaurant that would close at 3pm but when we went there 80% of the food items/ trays were empty & so we just requested a pizza from there live counter section. Then we checked into our room by 4:30 & got ready for beach and by the time we reached the sun beds & started to have some beach time the staff informed us about its closing time which was 5:40 pm or so.
Next morning when we wanted to take shower to get ready for enjoying the property, dark yellow water started flowing in from our washroom taps and after multiple rounds by their engineers & 3 hours of waiting time the issue was fixed.
Then we just got ready and checked out the room.

reviews.title: Stay at DT Hilton Marjan Island
reviews.text:
Nestled amidst the azure waters and golden sands of Marjan Island, the Hilton DoubleTree Marjan Island stands as a beacon of luxury and relaxation. My recent stay at this exquisite resort left me utterly captivated, and I'm thrilled to share my experience.

From the moment I stepped into the grand lobby, I was greeted with warm smiles and impeccable hospitality. The check-in process was seamless, and the staff went above and beyond to ensure my comfort throughout my stay.

The accommodations were nothing short of spectacular. My room boasted stunning views of the crystal-clear waters, with modern amenities and plush furnishings that exuded both style and comfort. The attention to detail was evident in every corner, from the luxurious bedding to the sleek design elements.

One of the highlights of my stay was the culinary experience at the resort's restaurants. Whether indulging in a sumptuous breakfast spread at Al Marjan, savoring authentic Italian cuisine at Vespa, or enjoying a refreshing cocktail at the rooftop bar, each meal was a culinary delight that tantalized my taste buds.

The resort's amenities left me spoiled for choice. I spent leisurely hours lounging by the infinity pool, soaking up the sun and enjoying poolside service. For those seeking relaxation, the onsite spa offered a haven of tranquility, with a range of rejuvenating treatments to pamper the senses.

Families will find plenty to keep everyone entertained, with a dedicated kids' club and a variety of activities suitable for all ages. From beach volleyball to water sports, there's something for everyone to enjoy.

What truly sets Hilton DoubleTree Marjan Island apart is the exceptional service provided by the staff. Every interaction was met with genuine warmth and professionalism, ensuring that my every need was met with utmost care and attention.

Overall, my stay at Hilton DoubleTree Marjan Island was nothing short of extraordinary. Whether you're seeking a romantic getaway, a family vacation, or simply a retreat to unwind and recharge, this resort offers an unparalleled experience of luxury and relaxation. I cannot recommend it highly enough and eagerly anticipate my next visit to this slice of paradise.

reviews.title: Check in and check out process is abysmal
reviews.positives: Check in took over an hour. Understandably it’s a busy time with it being a holiday, but the entire process was unorganized, slow and inefficient. Considering there was only one person in front of me, waiting an hour to begin my check in process on top of an additional 30 minutes to be given my room and key is unacceptable. Considering I’d paid for an all inclusive one night stay, check in only being from 3pm onwards, it was almost 5pm before I could even explore the facilities. The staff were nice, and they were working hard but the entire logistics and process was majorly flawed. Check out was another hour long process, and I couldn’t leave the resort because cars would come in and the valets were also unpacking cars and moving bags, all without a designated area for the cars to park without blocking everyone in. Again, I don’t blame the individual staff because they are doing what they’re instructed to do my management but the check in and check out process was extremely slow and inefficient. I was told by reception prior that inclusive package meant half off discounts at given restaurants. I went to one of those restaurants for dinner and the discount wasn’t even applied despite speaking with management of the place and they ensured me that it was. The checkout desk confirmed that it wasn’t applied after all. This was an overall very poor standard for the price that is demanded for an inclusive staycation.

reviews.title: Fun in the water and with the facilities but food issues!
reviews.positives: The facilities are great with lots for the children to do - the water park was a huge hit as well as the sea playground. The bathrooms in the rooms were really nice however the shower gel was empty.
reviews.negatives:
There were sadly faults on this trip...

The first was at check in as we off loaded all our bags and my husband got told where to park the car. I got no help carrying them to check in. Once checked in we then had to carry them out to a golf buggy to take them to our room... we then had to go back for the car to bring it closer to the room. It would have been much simpler all around to leave everything in the car and drive ourselves to the 3rd block. 

There were no cookies left at check in - it was 4:30pm and we were told 'they were being baked.

The sofa in our room had a disgusting brown stain all up the side that looked like faeces or a chocolate explosion. We had to cover it with a towel to try to ignore it.

We were woken on the second day by staff members pushing a trolley loudly under our balcony and talking loudly, this was around 7am - we appreciate jobs have to be done but another path could perhaps be used.

Food was the biggest issue! Breakfast was so busy, the food left out on the heaters was cold.

During dinner our waitress was really bad - she kept standing right between us when we were deep in conversation. We asked for a break between courses and this was ignored as the food came immediately. She gave sorbet without a spoon and by the time the spoon came the mango sorbet had melted. We also asked for food without tomatoes and it was brought with tomatoes... and so on and so on. Very bad service.

Nice Hotel. Good Facilities. Ours was a half board package. Food was very ordinary. No option for Indian vegetarian food. Even with limited option the preparation was not up to mark. The Hotel surely needs to improve on this. My family struggled for food and had to order food from outside.
Other than this the stay was good.
reviews.response:
Dear KIRAN,
Thank you for sharing your experience with us!
It was an absolute delight to have welcomed you to our resort
Double Tree by Hilton Resort & Spa Marjan Island. We have
reviewed your recent stay at our hotel and we appreciate your
feedback. Your wonderful comments make our efforts so much
more worthwhile knowing they are appreciated, I am sorry to
hear that at some point shortcomings encountered during your
recent stay.
We highly value your input as it will assist us in improving our
service in certain level of highlighted concerns.
We hope to redeem your faith in us, and to one day provide
you with a great experience that you well deserve.
Until then I remain with sincere apologies.
Kind Regards,
Pieter Van Beugen,
General Manager

reviews.title: Great but not for foodies
reviews.text:
We had a relaxing night staycation at Doubletree but there were a couple of issues. 
The pools are great. The beach is nice. BUT the food we had wasn’t great and because of that we will not rush back.  Could not get a hot cup of tea either. 
We booked Bay Club rooms so they are slightly bigger and we had interconnecting rooms which was great. The keys never worked in the doors though and literally EVERY time we used the door, we had to call someone to let us in. 

Ok but not great.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Great staycation to Celebrate our 15th Wedding Anniversary
reviews.text:
We had a wonderful staycation. From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel incredibly welcome. The check-in process was smooth and efficient, and the room was spotless, spacious, and beautifully designed — perfect for relaxing and unwinding.

The amenities were top-notch, especially the pool, which added that perfect touch of luxury to our stay. We also loved the food — every meal was delicious, fresh, and thoughtfully prepared. The hotel’s location made it easy to enjoy both comfort and convenience.

What truly stood out was the warm hospitality and attention to detail. Every member of the staff went above and beyond to ensure we had an exceptional experience.

Highly recommended for anyone looking to escape the routine and enjoy a peaceful, pampered getaway. We’ll definitely be back!
reviews.response:
Dear Renato,

Thank you for choosing to celebrate such a special occasion with us, and for taking the time to share your lovely feedback.
We are truly honored to have been part of your 15th wedding anniversary and delighted to know your stay was filled with comfort, great service, and memorable moments. Your kind words about the room, amenities, food, and especially the warm hospitality of our team mean a lot to us.
We hope to welcome you back again soon for another relaxing stay (Maybe for your next celebration!)
Warm regards,
Pieter Van Beugen
General Manager

reviews.title: 17th Anniversary  with Doubletree by Hilton @ al marjan island is❤️
reviews.text:
It's our first time going Al Marjan Island and it's our anniversary(17th anniversary).
We asked for a room with a nice view and some romantic set-up because it's our special time of the year.
And doubletree by Hilton didn't let us down.
We came at the hotel at around 10pm because we came from work and it was a long drive and the minutes we arrived we were greeted by smiling faces and warmth.
The view is amazing, the facilities are excellent, the service is exceptional and the people who work for this hotel are world class. 
I'm gonna rate it as 20/10, 10stars out of 5stars. One of the best hotel we ever checked in.
Special shout out to the following peope: Anjali and Reema of the reception team; Ramzan of the concierge ; Irushi of al marjan restaurant ;Marietta of Jouri Rose Spa and Reina, mohamad and Sheriffo of adventure sports

These individuals made our stay extra special and we'll definitely return to this hotel.
reviews.response:
Dear Jemelie
We are truly heartened to receive your generous review. Thank you
for letting us know how much you enjoyed it, we are especially
pleased that you felt well-looked after. We look forward to having
you with us again in the near future.
Kind Regards,
Double Tree by Hilton Resort & Spa Marjan Island
